name: Pico Bolivar con Uro Adventure
description: The highest peak in Venezuela — a serious 2-day climb for couples and small groups with certified guides, full gear, camping at Domingo Pena's historic base, and teleferico access. Not for beginners, but unforgettable. Requires good physical condition and acclimatization. The route passes through paramo landscape with frailejones and stunning views of the Sierra Nevada.
best_for: Experienced hikers, couples seeking adventure, small groups
includes: Certified mountain guides, camping gear, meals, teleferico ticket, safety equipment

name: Autana Tepuy con Cruz de Bolivar
description: 8-day deep jungle expedition by river through the Orinoco, Sipapo and Autana — visiting indigenous communities, swimming in Lago Leopoldo, and summiting Cerro Wajari. One of Venezuela's most remote and epic experiences. You travel by curiara (traditional canoe) through pristine jungle, camp in indigenous communities, and witness one of the most sacred tepuyes up close.
best_for: Adventure seekers, nature photographers, cultural travelers
includes: River transport, indigenous community stays, all meals, guides, camping equipment, permits

name: Roraima con Cruz de Bolivar
description: 6-day trek to the summit of the ancient Roraima tepuy — the inspiration for Conan Doyle's 'Lost World.' All-inclusive expedition from Ciudad Bolivar with guides, cook, camping gear, and official permits included. The summit is a surreal landscape of rock formations, crystal pools, and endemic species found nowhere else on Earth. One of the most iconic treks in South America.
includes: Transport from Ciudad Bolivar, certified guides, cook, all meals, camping gear, INPARQUES permits

name: Cascada 7 Pisos con Cruz de Bolivar
description: 2-day road trip combining a 7-tier waterfall, Playa Colorada, Mochima, and the Casa Fuerte in Barcelona — with transport, meals, lodging at a posada with ocean views, and a local guide all included. Perfect mix of beach, nature, and history in Venezuela's eastern coast. Playa Colorada is one of the most beautiful beaches in the country with golden sand and turquoise water.
best_for: Families, couples, first-time travelers to Venezuela, beach lovers
includes: Transport, posada lodging, meals, local guide, beach access

name: Free Tour Centro Historico de Caracas — El Guia Tour
description: A 3.5-hour walk through 19th-century afrancesado Caracas — Basilica Santa Teresa, Teatro Municipal, Plaza Bolivar, Panteon Nacional. Pay-what-you-feel format led by professional heritage guides. Learn about the city's architectural evolution, from colonial to neoclassical, and the stories behind Caracas' most iconic landmarks. Great introduction to the capital for newcomers.
best_for: History lovers, first-time visitors to Caracas, culture enthusiasts, solo travelers
includes: Professional heritage guide, historical commentary, walking tour
